hero.description: Speak, snap a photo, or type. VibeFitAI extracts your sets, weights, and reps with AI — and shows you exactly how you're progressing.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card · Your account ready in under a minute.

gallery.title: Built for the real gym
gallery.subtitle: No excuses, no friction — grab your phone, speak or take a photo, and keep training.

features.title: Technology designed for your progress
features.subtitle: No forms, no friction. VibeFitAI does the heavy lifting so you can just train.

smartLog.title: Smart logging
smartLog.desc: Speak naturally, snap a photo of the gym whiteboard, or type it however you'd say it. VibeFitAI extracts sets, reps, and loads automatically.

records.title: Instant records
records.desc: Every set you log is compared against your history. The moment you beat a personal best, VibeFitAI lets you know right away.

chat.title: Chat with your history
chat.desc: "How much did I squat last Monday?" — ask your data in plain language and get the answer instantly.

howItWorks.title: The end of manual logging
howItWorks.subtitle: Forget spreadsheets and messy notes. VibeFitAI processes natural language.

speak.title: Talk like you normally would
speak.desc: No templates, no dropdown menus. Type or say your workout exactly as it comes out, and the AI structures it for you.
speak.example: "Log 3 sets of overhead press at 40kg for 12 reps"

records.title: Spots your records instantly
records.desc: Every set is compared against your full history. The moment you beat a mark, VibeFitAI tells you right there on the logging screen.

howItWorks.focus: No nutrition plan. No distractions. Just your strength progress.
howItWorks.privacy: Total privacy. Your data belongs to you and no one else.

panel.subtitle: Join athletes using their real-time data to push past their limits every day.

logging.title: Voice & photo logging
logging.desc: Say "4 sets of bench press at 80kg" or upload a photo — VibeFitAI saves it on its own.

progress.title: Real progression
progress.desc: Week-over-week load charts and instant record detection.

chat.title: Chat with your data
chat.desc: "How much did I squat last Monday?" — instant answers from your history.

form.title: Start your journey
form.subtitle: Create an account or log in to unlock the power of AI in your training.
form.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to the
form.forgotHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a 6-digit code to confirm it's you and choose a new password.

reset.title: Confirm your code
reset.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you, along with the password you want to use from now on.
reset.missingEmail: The email is missing from the link. Go back to
reset.resent: We sent you a new code.
reset.backToCode: Go back and edit the code

dashboard.moodExcellent: Your progress this week is exceptional.
dashboard.moodGood: Good pace. Keep it up this week.
dashboard.sessionsThisWeek: You're at {done} of {goal} sessions this week
dashboard.sessionsRemaining: {count, plural, one {You need # more session} other {You need # more sessions}} to hit your goal. Log the next one and keep your streak.
dashboard.goodTimeToReview: Good time to review your load progression and plan next week.
dashboard.coachNote: "{name}, resting well today boosts your performance in the next session. Recover!"
dashboard.firstWorkoutPrompt: Log your first workout however you like:

methodVoice.label: Voice
methodVoice.desc: say what you did: "4 sets of bench press at 60kg"

methodPhoto.label: Photo
methodPhoto.desc: of the machine screen or your workout sheet

methodText.label: Text
methodText.desc: type it however you'd say it, the AI understands

onboarding.birthHint: Helps us personalize your metrics. You can skip this if you'd rather.
onboarding.measurementsHint: To calculate your volume and progression more precisely.
onboarding.goalQuestion: How many days a week do you want to train?
onboarding.goalHint: Your weekly goal. The dashboard will show how you're doing against it.
onboarding.photoTitle: Put a face to your profile
onboarding.photoHint: Optional — you can always add it later from your profile.
onboarding.uploadFailed: Error uploading the image. Try again.
onboarding.uploadConnectionError: Connection error while uploading the photo.
onboarding.saveFailed: We couldn't save your profile. Try again.

settings.optimizeDesc: Review your load progression, records, and VibeFitAI analysis.
settings.photoHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP · max. 5 MB
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteWarning: This permanently deletes your account and all your data: sessions, sets, records, and profile. This action can't be undone.
settings.confirmDeleteTitle: Confirm you want to delete everything

errors.uploadFailed: Error uploading the image. Try again.
errors.savePhotoFailed: We couldn't save your new photo.
errors.uploadConnectionError: Connection error while uploading the photo.

record.title: New Activity
record.subtitle: Choose how you want to log your workout today.
record.processingHint: The AI is analyzing your file. Usually takes a few seconds.
record.textPlaceholder: E.g.: 3 sets of 10 reps Bench Press 60kg...

errors.processingTimeout: Processing is taking longer than usual. Check your history in a few minutes.

audioRecorder.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support speech recognition. Use Chrome or Edge.

photoUpload.previewAlt: Photo of your workout pending analysis

history.title: History
history.sessionsRegistered: {count, plural, one {# session logged} other {# sessions logged}}
history.emptyDesc: Log your first workout to see it here.
